name: WW Tuna Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the tuna.
2. Combine the tuna, onion, oregano, egg, and 2/3 cup of tomato sauce in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a 10-inch pie plate and press it evenly on the bottom and half way up the sides.
4. Spread the remaining tomato sauce over the tuna mixture.
5. Top with shredded Mozzarella cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until the cheese is lightly browned.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
